config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society's interests matter, but they should not automatically come before individual rights, because rights are what protect people from being sacrificed for vague collective goals. In my view, a healthy society is built when the public good and personal freedoms are balanced, not when one side can simply override the other. From my perspective, once you give society priority over the individual too easily, it becomes too easy to justify abuse in the name of order or progress.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, hak individu adalah pagar utama terhadap penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, dan sejarah kita sendiri menunjukkan betapa mudahnya “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penindasan. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar, bukan diberi prioritas otomatis. Kalau masyarakat ingin kuat dan adil, caranya bukan mengorbankan individu, melainkan menyeimbangkan keduanya dengan sangat hati-hati.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the idea that society should automatically come before the individual, because in Indonesia we already know how easily “the common good” can be used to pressure people into silence. I value gotong royong and public order, but those ideas are not a license to trample basic rights like free expression, due process, or personal dignity. When the state or the majority gets too much power, the people who suffer first are usually minorities, critics, and ordinary citizens with no influence. A strong society should protect individuals first, because that is what makes collective life legitimate rather than oppressive.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena menurut saya hak individu harus menjadi batas utama, bukan dikalahkan begitu saja oleh kepentingan masyarakat. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat terlalu banyak contoh ketika “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan sensor, diskriminasi, atau penyalahgunaan kekuasaan terhadap kelompok yang tidak populer. Kepentingan publik memang nyata dan penting, tetapi ia sah hanya kalau tetap menghormati hak dasar seperti kebebasan berbicara, proses hukum yang adil, dan martabat pribadi. Masyarakat yang kuat bukan yang paling mudah mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang mampu melindungi orang per orang sambil mengejar tujuan bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should matter, but they should not take priority over individual rights as a general rule. From my perspective in Indonesia, we already know how easily “public order” or “the common good” can be used to silence criticism, pressure minorities, or excuse abuse by people in power. I value gotong royong and social harmony, but those only mean something if basic rights like free expression, due process, and dignity are protected first. A society that can override the individual too easily is not strong; it is just giving itself permission to become unfair.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak keras gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu sebagai aturan umum. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, hak individu adalah perlindungan paling penting terhadap penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, dan sejarah kita berulang kali menunjukkan betapa mudahnya alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membungkam orang yang tidak populer. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi hanya sah kalau tetap dibatasi oleh hak dasar seperti kebebasan berbicara, proses hukum yang adil, dan martabat pribadi. Masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling gampang mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang mampu melindungi orang per orang sambil mengejar tujuan bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
